name: SKILLS-CUSTOM
description: Kumpulan custom skills untuk Claude Code: landing page designer, project starter, readiness auditor, dan codebase auditor

plugins.name: landing-designer
plugins.description: Create high-quality, conversion-focused landing pages with strong design and marketing structure. Use when building or improving marketing landing pages for any product or service.

plugins.name: project-starter
plugins.description: Help build new projects from scratch. Provides structured guidance and scaffolding for starting any type of project (web app, full-stack, backend, AI agent, etc.). Use when starting a new project from zero.

plugins.name: codebase-auditor
plugins.description: Perform comprehensive codebase inspection, architecture review, and systematic bug detection. Use when user wants deep audit, structural analysis, bug hunting, or architecture review of the current project.

plugins.name: prd-creator
plugins.description: Create detailed and comprehensive Product Requirements Documents (PRD). Supports codebase analysis, prioritization, and effort estimation. Use when defining new features, improvements, or new products.

plugins.name: workspace-designer
plugins.description: Design modern workspaces and dashboards for web applications, especially AI agent tools. Helps with layout structure, component selection, UX patterns, and frontend implementation using Next.js + Tailwind. Use when building internal tools, admin panels, or AI workspaces.

plugins.name: readiness-auditor
plugins.description: Assess whether a project, product, or initiative is ready to proceed by reviewing scope, risks, dependencies, technical health, and launch readiness. Use when validating preparation before execution, delivery, or release.

plugins.name: video-content-creator
plugins.description: Help create high-quality demo videos and promotional videos. Supports planning, scripting, tone adjustment, and prompt generation for AI video tools. Use when building video content for any product or brand.
